title: Eveready Bayonet Light Bulb 60w, B22 LED Bulbs Warm White 2700K, LED BC Energy Saver Bulb, 806 Lumen, Non-Dimmable, 3-Pack
features: ENERGY EFFICIENT PERFORMANCE - Eveready 8.5W LED bulbs B22 fitting offer the same brightness as a traditional 60W incandescent bulb (806 lumens), making them an excellent energy-saving option while still enjoying optimal light output.

WARM WHITE 3000K - The warm white colour temperature creates a cosy and welcoming ambience in any space, whether its your living room, office or commercial area. Eveready light bulbs are perfect for both residential and professional environments.

LED B22 BAYONET – Featuring a B22 bayonet fitting, our 60W bayonet light bulbs are designed for hassle-free installation. Simply click them into place, and you're ready to enjoy bright, consistent lighting for a wide range of lighting fixtures.

COMPACT & MODERN - With their sleek, compact size, our B22 LED bulbs can be used in almost any fixture, from ceiling lights to wall lamps. Their versatile design makes them a great choice for a variety of spaces, offering consistent performance.

QUALITY ASSURED - A global leader in power and lighting solutions, Eveready offers innovative and reliable products for everyday life. Committed to quality and sustainability, Eveready keeps you powered and illuminated, no matter where life takes you.
description: Transform your space efficiently with the Eveready B22 bulb that offers a 3000K warm white glow that provides a comfortable and inviting ambience, perfect for living rooms, bedrooms, or any room in need of cosy lighting. Despite their compact design, our B22 LED bulb warm white delivers an impressive 806 lumens of brightness, matching the output of traditional 60W bulbs, yet only consuming 8.5W of power. This means you save on energy bills while still enjoying full brightness with Eveready’s B22 light bulb warm white LEDs. Our non-dimmable bayonet LED light bulb pack of 3 is ideal for both home and commercial use, offering easy and hassle-free installation. Choosing Eveready LED lightbulbs bayonet fitting is a convenient solution for anyone to install. Their compact size and sleek, modern design also make these 60W LED bayonet light bulbs versatile—perfect for everything from ceiling lights to wall fixtures and table lamps. SPECIFICATIONS: - Cap Type: Bayonet B22 - Colour Output: Warm White 3000K - Power Consumption: 8.5W - 806 Lumens - Pack of 3 - Non Dimmable
